text.title: Log Collection with Filebeat and Elastic Beats Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the methodology end-to-end.

step.name: enum-sources
step.action: List all log paths + container patterns.

step.name: compose-inputs
step.action: Author inputs with service + environment + fields_under_root=true; add multiline where applicable.

step.name: configure-autodiscover
step.action: Enable Kubernetes autodiscover provider with hints.enabled.

step.name: configure-output
step.action: Set output.elasticsearch (or logstash) with TLS + auth + bulk settings.

step.name: deploy
step.action: Apply ConfigMap + DaemonSet to logging namespace. Verify pods + index pattern in Kibana.
